2604.11206.title: Designing Adaptive Digital Nudging Systems with LLM-Driven Reasoning
2604.11206.paper_summary: Digital nudging systems lack architectural guidance for translating behavioral science into software design. While research identifies nudge strategies and quality attributes, existing architectures fail to integrate multi-dimensional user modeling with ethical compliance as architectural concerns. We present an architecture that uses behavioral theory through explicit architectural decisions, treating ethics and fairness as structural guardrails rather than implementation details. A literature review synthesized 68 nudging strategies, 11 quality attributes, and 3 user profiling dimensions into architectural requirements. The architecture implements sequential processing layers with cross-cutting evaluation modules enforcing regulatory compliance. Validation with 13 software architects confirmed requirements satisfaction and domain transferability. An LLM-powered proof-of-concept in residential energy sustainability demonstrated feasibility through evaluation with 15 users, achieving high perceived intervention quality and measurable positive emotional impact. This work bridges behavioral science and software architecture by providing reusable patterns for adaptive systems that balance effectiveness with ethical constraints.
2604.11206.paper_summary_zh: 數位推動系統缺乏將行為科學轉化為軟體設計的架構指導。雖然研究確定了推動策略和質量屬性，但現有架構未能將多維用戶建模與倫理合規性整合為架構考量。我們提出了一種架構，通過明確的架構決策使用行為理論，將倫理和公平視為結構性護欄，而非實施細節。文獻回顧綜合了68種推動策略、11種質量屬性和3個用戶剖析維度，形成了架構需求。該架構實現了具有交叉評估模塊的順序處理層，以強化合規性。與13位軟體架構師的驗證確認了需求滿足和領域可轉移性。一個基於LLM的住宅能源可持續性概念驗證展示了通過15名用戶的評估實現可行性，達到了高感知介入質量和可測量的正面情感影響。這項工作通過提供可重用的模式，將行為科學和軟體架構聯繫起來，為平衡有效性與倫理限制的自適應系統提供了支持。
2604.11206.author: Tiziano Santilli et.al.
2604.11206.authors: Tiziano Santilli, Mina Alipour, Mahyar Tourchi Moghaddam
